backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a dairy farm app implementing access-controlled CRUD operations for user profiles, customers, delivery records, milk production records, cattle management, and health/breed reporting with role-based authorization via a MixinAuthorization mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming high-confidence implementation of a 'Download CSV' button on the Milk Production page, referencing the two files that implement it: MilkProduction.tsx and csvExport.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable recent changes across pages, components, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color roles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Dairy Business App' that mounts the React root at the #root div and loads the main.tsx entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Query and TanStack Router with seven routes (dashboard, cattle, milk, inventory, customers, deliveries, reports) all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Reusable form component for adding or editing cattle records, handling fields for breed, age, milk production, health status (with sick sub-fields), purchase info, notes, and a status Select dropdown using the backend CattleStatus enum.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: Reusable form component for adding or editing customer records with name, address, phone, and an active/inactive Switch toggle, using a submission guard ref to prevent double-submits.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: A React form component supporting two modes: 'add' (full inventory item creation with name, category, quantity, unit, and threshold) and 'update' (quantity-only update for an existing item).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering a sticky header with logo and navigation links, a responsive mobile hamburger menu, a main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: Displays a Recharts bar chart of the last 7 days of milk production (in liters) aggregated from an array of MilkRecord objects.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageM: A dialog modal that previews a formatted WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for a customer, with options to open WhatsApp directly or copy the message to clipboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity for authentication and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: A small hook that wraps the Clipboard API to copy text, exposing isCopied state that auto-resets after a configurable delay and an error state for failures.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend data operations (cattle, customers, milk records, delivery records, user profiles) along with time utility functions for nanosecond/Date conversions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm earthy farm-themed design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: Defines a local TypeScript interface for InventoryItem used in frontend-only inventory tracking.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: Page component for viewing, adding, and editing cattle records, displaying a stats summary and a table with health/status badges and dialogs for CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: Page component for managing customers, showing a stats grid and table with add/edit dialogs, restricted to authenticated users for mutations.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a hero banner, stat cards (active cattle, today's milk, missed deliveries), a milk production chart, and a recent milk records table.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Page component for logging and viewing daily milk delivery records, with a form to add deliveries, date-based filtering, summary stats, and a WhatsApp message modal for customer notifications.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: Page component for managing farm inventory (feed, medicine, supplies) with local state, low-stock alerts, and dialogs for adding items or updating quantities.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: Page component for logging and filtering daily milk yield records per cattle, with a chart visualization and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: Page component displaying monthly aggregated reports for deliveries and milk production, including per-customer breakdowns, delivery boy performance stats, and CSV download support.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility functions for exporting delivery records per customer and milk production records to downloadable CSV files with summary rows.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappMessageFormat: Defines utilities to format a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for AO Farms and generate a wa.me URL with the encoded message for a given phone number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including farm, sidebar, chart, warning, and success palettes), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the AO Farms Manager project state at version 3, recording one existing CSV-export feature and one pending export feature request (AR-1) for the Milk Production page.
